methodology_notes: Commands from the skill's SKILL.md were executed manually by the evaluator, NOT by a separate agent instance with the skill loaded. This validates the skill's commands produce correct outputs.

assertions.description: A screenshot file was committed to the PR for each affected dashboard
assertions.evidence: Files after-overview.png (66270 bytes) and after-deploy-freq.png (66280 bytes) were created locally. The git commit step was NOT executed.

assertions.description: The screenshot file name clearly identifies which dashboard it belongs to
assertions.evidence: Files named after-overview.png and after-deploy-freq.png using the skill's <prefix>-<uid>.png convention.

assertions.description: Only post-change (after) screenshots are present — no before screenshots
Screenshots are taken of Grafana at http://localhost:3004 with panels fully loaded
assertions.evidence: Screenshots were taken from a real Grafana instance. Similar file sizes across different dashboards may indicate Grafana served identical pages. Visual inspection was not performed.

notes: Manual command execution, not an agent run. The with_skill vs without_skill comparison is not meaningful since both used the same manual process — the evaluator already knew which commands to run.
